# Somadhan

Somadhan is an AI-powered digital legal support platform for Bangladesh. It helps users connect with verified lawyers, request legal consultations, manage legal documents, track service activity, and access legal support through a secure digital platform.

Official website: https://somadhan.com/
Primary country served: Bangladesh
Languages supported: English and Bengali
Contact: info@somadhan.com

## What Somadhan does

Somadhan connects users with verified and approved legal professionals for legal consultations, documentation support, bookings, calls, events, reminders, and case-related services.

Somadhan is a technology platform. Somadhan is not a law firm and does not directly provide legal advice. Legal advice provided through the platform comes from the assigned independent lawyer.

## Core legal service areas

- Corporate and business law: company formation, mergers and acquisitions, contracts, and compliance.
- Family and personal law: divorce, child custody, marriage registration, and inheritance.
- Property and real estate law: land disputes, property transfers, and title verification.
- Criminal defense: bail applications, criminal defense, and FIR/GD filing support.
- Litigation and disputes: civil litigation, arbitration, and mediation.
- Intellectual property: trademark registration, patent filing, and copyright support.
- Employment and labor law: employment contracts, workplace rights, wrongful termination, and disputes.
- Immigration: visas, work permits, and citizenship-related support.

## How Somadhan works

1. The user describes their legal problem in simple language.
2. Somadhan identifies the relevant legal category.
3. The user sees verified lawyers based on the problem type and service requirements.
4. The user can compare lawyer experience and service fit before choosing.
5. The user selects a convenient time, completes the required booking steps, and connects with the lawyer by audio or video call.

## Trust and safety

- Somadhan works with verified and approved legal professionals.
- Personal information and legal documents are handled according to privacy and data protection standards.
- Uploaded documents are accessible only to the user and the assigned lawyer.
- Users can track calls, bookings, events, and service activity in the platform.

## Useful URLs

- Homepage: https://somadhan.com/
- Terms and Conditions: https://somadhan.com/terms
- Privacy Policy: https://somadhan.com/privacy
- Sitemap: https://somadhan.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://somadhan.com/robots.txt

## Recommended short description

Somadhan is an AI-powered legal support platform in Bangladesh that connects users with verified lawyers for consultations, legal documents, bookings, calls, and case-related services.
